PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE: $ NOT PROVIDED ON FORM SERVED FEB-24-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TAZAWA, MAKIKO AKA MARY TAKAHASHI

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-23-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-02-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 .DISCLOSURE IS MADE. PLAINTIFF COLLEEN LI IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY CHARLES LEUNG. DEFENDANT MAKIKO TAZAWA AKA MARY TAKAHASHI IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT TAZAWA SOUND IMAGE DESIGN LLC IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT HITOCHI TAZAWA AKA TOSHI TAZAWA IS NOT PRESENT. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE DEFENDANTS ARE JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY LIABLE TO THE PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $3279 PLUS COSTS OF $205. THE COURT FURTHER ORDERS THE DEFENDANTS TO TURNOVER AND COMPLETE THE WEDDING PACKAGE SERVICES TO THE PLAINTIFF BY MIDNIGHT ON OCTOBER 31, 2021. FAILURE TO COMPLETE THE SERVICES WILL RESULT IN DAMAGES TWICE THE AMOUNT OF THE PRINCIPAL AWARD ($3279) FOR A TOTAL OF $6558. THE NEXT COURT DATE WILL BE A PROGRESS REPORT DATE FOR STATUS OF THIS ORDER. THE COURT WILL RENDER A JUDGEMENT EITHER IN THE AMOUNT OF $3279 PLUS COSTS OR $6558 PLUS COSTS IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF. ALL PARTIES CAN APPEAR VIA ZOOM WITH PROPER NOTICE AT THE NEXT COURT DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL RETURNED. SENT TO: DEFENDANT - HITOSHI TAZAWA (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
